questionText: Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.
questionLabel: [Q1][medium] Show annual revenue, total cost, gross profit, gross margin percentage, and total order lines by fiscal year. Return columns: Fiscal Year, total_revenue, total_cost, gross_profit, gross_margin_pct, total_order_lines. Sort by Fiscal Year ascending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    s.Fiscal Year AS Fiscal Year,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS total_cost,
    SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS gross_profit,
    ROUND(100.0 * (SUM(s.Sales Amount) - SUM(s.Total Product Cost)) / SUM(s.Sales Amount), 2) AS gross_margin_pct,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_order_lines
FROM Sales s
GROUP BY s.Fiscal Year
ORDER BY s.Fiscal Year ASC;"}

questionText: List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.
questionLabel: [Q4][medium] List the top 10 products by revenue, showing product name, category, subcategory, revenue, units sold, gross profit, and margin percentage. Return columns: Product, Category, Subcategory, revenue, units_sold, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending, limit to 10 rows.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    p.Product,
    p.Category,
    p.Subcategory,
    SUM(S.SalesAmount) AS revenue,
    SUM(S.OrderQuantity) AS units_sold,
    SUM(S.SalesAmount - S.TotalProductCost) AS gross_profit,
    ROUND((SUM(S.SalesAmount - S.TotalProductCost) / SUM(S.SalesAmount)) * 100, 2) AS margin_pct
FROM Sales S
JOIN Product p ON S.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY p.Product, p.Category, p.Subcategory
ORDER BY revenue DESC
LIMIT 10;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    c.Customer,
    c.City,
    c.State-Province,
    c.Country-Region,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_orders,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS total_line_items,
    SUM(s.Unit Price) AS total_units,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS lifetime_revenue,
    SUM(s.Total Product Cost) AS lifetime_profit
FROM Customer c
LEFT JOIN Sales s ON c.CustomerKey = s.CustomerKey
WHERE c.CustomerKey != -1
GROUP BY c.Customer, c.City, c.State-Province, c.Country-Region
ORDER BY lifetime_revenue DESC
LIMIT 15"}

Return columns: Business Type, reseller_count, total_revenue, revenue_per_reseller, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    r.Business_Type,
    COUNT(DISTINCT r.ResellerKey) AS reseller_count,
    SUM(S.SalesAmount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(S.SalesAmount) / COUNT(DISTINCT r.ResellerKey) AS revenue_per_reseller,
    SUM(S.SalesAmount) - SUM(S.ProductStandardCost) AS gross_profit,
    ROUND((SUM(S.SalesAmount) - SUM(S.ProductStandardCost) / SUM(S.SalesAmount)) * 100, 2) AS margin_pct
FROM Sales_SalesTerritory st
JOIN Reseller r ON st.SalesTerritoryKey = r.ResellerKey
JOIN Sales S ON st.SalesTerritoryKey = S.SalesTerritoryKey
WHERE r.Business_Type IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY r.Business_Type
ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;"}

questionLabel: [Q9][hard] Show order lines, revenue, units sold, revenue per unit (total revenue ÷ total units sold), average list price per product in the subcategory, gross profit, and margin percentage for each product subcategory. Return columns: Subcategory, order_lines, revenue, units_sold, revenue_per_unit, avg_list_price, gross_profit, margin_pct. Sort by revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    p.Subcategory,
    COUNT(s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS order_lines,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS revenue,
    SUM(s.UnitQuantity) AS units_sold,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) / NULLIF(SUM(s.UnitQuantity), 0) AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG(p.ListPrice) AS avg_list_price,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) - SUM(p.StandardCost) AS gross_profit,
    ROUND((SUM(s.SalesAmount) - SUM(p.StandardCost)) / NULLIF(SUM(s.SalesAmount), 0) * 100, 2) AS margin_pct
FROM Sales s
JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY p.Subcategory
ORDER BY revenue DESC;"}

questionText: Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.
questionLabel: [Q11][easy] Show the number of products, average list price, minimum list price, and maximum list price for each product category. Return columns: Category, product_count, avg_list_price, min_list_price, max_list_price. Sort by product_count descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    p.Category,
    COUNT(*) AS product_count,
    AVG(p.List Price) AS avg_list_price,
    MIN(p.List Price) AS min_list_price,
    MAX(p.List Price) AS max_list_price
FROM Product p
GROUP BY p.Category
ORDER BY product_count DESC;"}

Sort by Channel ascending, then total_revenue descending.

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    s.Channel,
    p.Category,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) AS total_revenue,
    SUM(s.Order Quantity) AS units_sold,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) / NULLIF(SUM(s.Order Quantity), 0) AS revenue_per_unit,
    AVG(p.List Price) AS avg_list_price,
    AVG(s.Unit Price Discount Pct) AS realized_discount_pct,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) - SUM(s.Product Standard Cost) AS gross_profit,
    SUM(s.Extended Amount) / NULLIF(SUM(s.Product Standard Cost), 0) * 100 AS margin_pct
FROM Sales s
JOIN Sales_Order so ON s.SalesOrderLineKey = so.SalesOrderLineKey
JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY s.Channel, p.Category
ORDER BY s.Channel ASC, total_revenue DESC;"}

function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments:
{"sql":"SELECT 
    st.Region AS Channel,
    p.Category AS Category,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) AS revenue,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) * 100.0 / SUM(s.SalesAmount) OVER (PARTITION BY st.Region) AS channel_revenue_share_pct,
    SUM(s.SalesAmount) * 100.0 / SUM(s.SalesAmount) OVER (PARTITION BY st.Region ORDER BY s.SalesAmount DESC) AS cumulative_channel_revenue_share_pct,
    COUNT(DISTINCT s.SalesOrderLineKey) AS orders,
    SUM(s.TotalProductCost) AS gross_profit
FROM Sales s
JOIN Sales_Territory st ON s.SalesTerritoryKey = st.SalesTerritoryKey
JOIN Product p ON s.ProductKey = p.ProductKey
GROUP BY st.Region, p.Category
ORDER BY st.Region ASC, revenue DESC, p.Category ASC;"}
